description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Calendarix 0.7.20070307, when magic_quotes_gpc is disabled, allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) month and (2) year parameters to calendar.php and the (3) search string to cal_search.php.
